evals.prompt: Make this Express app fully observable. The service is at examples/node/express-basic/
evals.expected_output: Full lifecycle: audit creates inventory, instrument adds OTel, verify confirms telemetry, provision creates dashboards
expectations: OpenTelemetry packages are added to package.json
An OTel setup or instrumentation file is created
The skill progresses through at least audit and instrument phases
inventory.md Status column has at least some OK entries after instrumentation
